name: Homie
rulesText: Homie: Whenever another one of your monsters dies while Homie is in play, Homie gains +3 strength. This bonus stacks and lasts until Homie is knocked out or returned to hand. Snacks: At the start of your turn, heal each of your monsters by 1 HP.
